title: tricliceras longepedunculatum var. longepedunculatum
intro: Tricliceras longepedunculatum var. longepedunculatum, also known as the Long-stalked Tricliceras, is a plant species within the family Passifloraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Tricliceras longepedunculatum var. longepedunculatum is prepared in various herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
